channel.title: Caesar AI Incident Atlas — Weekly Briefing Digests
channel.description: Factual weekly briefing digests mapping AI enforcements to operational mitigation actions.

item.title: Weekly AI Governance Briefing: Disability Discrimination in Hiring and Race Corrections in Clinical Algorithms
item.description: Systemic algorithmic bias in automated employment screening systems under the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA). Phasing out of race-based correction factors in clinical pulmonary function testing algorithms.
